[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kushone''' was an [[Intelligence Operations Command]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Following [[Operation Shadow Hand]], Kushone was one of three field team commanders reporting to [[Brigadier]] [[Colin Darkmere]].<ref name="FC" />

{{Char-stub}}
